aiHub.forecastBased: Dua tren pipeline cua Xantivation Studio va xac suat cac co hoi:

aiHub.riskReviewTitle: ### Ket qua ra soat rui ro phap ly hop dong
aiHub.riskReviewMsg: Toi da kiem tra noi dung file thoa thuan va phat hien:
aiHub.riskPaymentTerms: - **Dieu khoan thanh toan**: Thieu quy dinh phat cham tra tien (Lai suat phat qua han). *Muc do rui ro: Trung binh*.
aiHub.riskLiability: - **Gioi han trach nhiem**: Trach nhiem boi thuong cua studio chua duoc gioi han bang 100% gia tri hop dong thuc nhan. *Muc do rui ro: Cao*.
aiHub.riskRecommendation: *Khuyen nghi*: Bo sung dieu khoan gioi han trach nhiem boi thuong tai Muc 7.2 truoc khi kich hoat DocuSign gui doi tac.
